encounter.location: Bridgetown Recovery Center, 920 SE Sandy Blvd, Portland, OR 97214

conditions.name: alcohol use disorder, moderate, in early sustained remission

medications.name: naltrexone 50 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: take 1 tablet by mouth once daily

medications.name: lamotrigine 200 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: take 1 tablet by mouth once daily

medications.name: quetiapine 50 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: take 1 tablet by mouth at bedtime

document_references.description: Telephone aftercare follow-up note documenting 3-month post-IOP sustained sobriety, patient self-report of regular AA attendance and stable mood, continued tolerability of naltrexone without side effects, relapse prevention counseling, advice to establish addiction medicine or psychiatry care at new location prior to planned geographic relocation, and conclusion of care at Bridgetown Recovery Center.
